speed_rating.title: Speed rating
speed_rating.description: Tire speed rating is the top speed a tire can safely keep over time.

load_index.title: Load index
load_index.description: The load index indicates how much weight a tire can safely carry.

load_range.title: Load range
load_range.description: The tire load range indicates a tire’s strength and weight-carrying capacity, represented by letters (e.g., C, D, E). It corresponds to the ply rating and required air pressure, with higher ranges supporting heavier loads.

season.title: Season
season.description: Type of season or weather for which the tire is suitable.

display.title: Display
display.description: Filter for tire types based on availability or features.

order_by.title: Order By
order_by.description: Sort order for the tire listing.

tread_depth.title: Tread depth
tread_depth.description: This is the depth of tread of the tire (in 32nds of an inch), as typically manufactured. For example, a value of «11» indicates that the tread depth is 11/32 inches.

application.title: Application
application.description: Commercial tires are designed for specific applications. It's very important to consider your application when selecting a tire.

position.title: Position
position.description: Commercial tires are designed for a specific position (axle) on a vehicle.

run_flat.title: Run Flat
run_flat.description: Indicates if the tire is Run-Flat.

light_truck.title: Light Truck
light_truck.description: Indicates if the tire is for light trucks (LT).

sidewall.title: Sidewall
sidewall.description: These letters indicate the style of the lettering on the sidewall of the tire.

values.title: OBL/BSL
values.description: Outlined Black Letters/Black Serrated Letters per side

values.title: OWL/RBL
values.description: Outlined White Letters/Raised Black Letters per side

utqg.title: UTQG
utqg.description: Uniform Tire Quality Grading (UTGQ) rating system is used to classify tires within certain categories.

utqg_treadwear.title: Treadwear
utqg_treadwear.description: A tire treadwear rating is based on how quickly a tire’s tread wears down under controlled conditions.
utqg_treadwear.notes: Measured relative to standard government rating of 100

utqg_traction.title: Traction
utqg_traction.description: The traction rating determines the tire’s ability to grip and stop on wet pavement.
utqg_traction.notes: Possible ratings are: (AA, A, B, C)

utqg_temperature.title: Temperature
utqg_temperature.description: Temperature rating measures a tire’s resistance to heat buildup.

values.title: Asymmetrical
values.description: Distinct tread patterns on the inner and outer halves to optimize handling in wet and dry conditions.

values.title: SmartWay Verified
values.description: Certified by the U.S. EPA for meeting strict low rolling resistance criteria (primarily for trucks).

values.title: Foam
values.description: Features a layer of polyurethane foam adhered to the inner liner to absorb tire cavity noise.

values.title: Fuel Efficient
values.description: Designed with low rolling resistance to reduce energy use, improving vehicle fuel economy.

values.title: Studdable
values.description: A winter tire with pre-molded holes allows the addition of metal studs, providing enhanced traction on ice.

values.title: Studded
values.description: Comes with metal studs already installed in the tread to provide maximum grip on hard-packed snow and ice.

values.title: Symmetrical
values.description: The tread pattern is identical across the entire tire face, allowing for smooth driving and versatile rotation.

values.title: Non-Highway Service
values.description: Not approved for highway use; designed strictly for racing, agricultural, or temporary spare applications.

values.title: Electric Vehicle Optimized
values.description: Engineered to handle the heavier weight and torque of EVs while maximizing range and minimizing noise.

values.title: Cyclical Field Operation
values.description: Agricultural rating allowing for increased load capacity when loads vary significantly during a cycle.

values.title: Studless
values.description: Uses advanced rubber compounds and high-density sipes to provide winter traction without metal studs.

values.title: Noise Reduction System
values.description: Incorporates sound-absorbing technology (often foam) inside the tire to significantly reduce cabin noise.

values.title: Professional Off-Road
values.description: Commercial-grade tires designed for extreme terrain, featuring aggressive lugs and cut-resistant compounds.

values.title: Non-Directional
values.description: A universal tread pattern that can be mounted in any direction and rotated to any position on the vehicle.

values.title: Directional
values.description: Features a V-shaped tread pattern designed to roll in only one direction, excelling at water evacuation.

values.title: Tube Type
values.description: Requires a separate inner tube to hold air pressure; common in classic cars and some off-road tires.

values.title: Ice Grip
values.description: Indicates the tire meets specific international ISO standards for braking performance on icy surfaces.

values.title: Selfseal
values.description: MICHELIN® Selfseal® technology helps drivers avoid delays by sealing 90% of summit tread punctures from nails and screws.

When compared to the previous Mastercraft® products the tread compound and tread profile have been enhanced to provide all-season traction in wet, dry and winter conditions while giving the driver plenty of miles.
This design uses lateral slots in the shoulder to help ensure excellent traction throughout the life of the tire.

marketing.statement: Pirelli’s first 'Green Performance' tire, CINTURATO™ P7™ has been created to take full advantage of latest materials, structures and tread pattern design in order to guarantee savings, respect for the environment, comfort and safety on all road surfaces.

features.benefit: Our best all-weather traction, for Mother Nature's worst. Now you can feel confident with superior performance in even the harshest weather conditions. With an asymmetric tread pattern and sweeping traction grooves to evacuate water and deliver excellent wet traction. As the tire wears, Evolving Traction® Grooves transition from deep grooves to wide grooves to help displace water on the road.

When the temperature drops, this tire steps up the performance—with Soybean oil in the rubber compound that helps the tread stay pliable and grip the road in extreme cold. Specialized tread compounds help grip the road in wet, snow and ice—and earn Severe Snow Certification. SEVERE SNOW CERTIFIED.

Weather Reactive Technology™ combines Evolving Traction® Grooves with Tredlock® Technology, allowing the tread to lock together while cornering and open for more biting edges when you need enhanced wet traction.
